What We Do

Our Services

✦

Ceramic Coating

Professional-grade ceramic protection that bonds to your paint, delivering years of hydrophobic shine and UV defense.

01
◈

Paint Correction

Multi-stage polishing to eliminate swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation — restoring your paint to a flawless, mirror finish.

02
◎

Interior Detail

Deep cleaning of every surface inside your vehicle. Leather, fabric, plastics — all treated with precision and care.

03
⬡

Commercial & Fleet

From daily drivers to big rigs — no job is too large. Professional detailing for commercial vehicles and fleets.

04

Why Choose Us

Obsession Is Our Process

Owner Zac Taylor brings genuine passion to every vehicle. No shortcuts, no rush — just exceptional work backed by real craftsmanship and transparent communication.

From classic trucks to Mustangs to full-size semis, every job gets the same level of attention. Updates by text, fast turnaround, and pricing that won't surprise you.

"He is a very talented person... the ceramic coating — I'm just speechless! I would highly recommend Zac Taylor for all your detailing needs. I will be a life long customer!" — A Human, Google Review
